changes.description: Replit Core monthly price dropped from $25 to $20. Effective Feb 25, 2026 for all subscribers. Plan still includes $25/mo in usage credits. Note: the 2026-03-13 entry that 'corrected' Core to $25 was wrong — $20 was the new monthly price, not just the annual rate.
Google AI Pro price rounded up from $19.99 to $20.00/mo. Pricing flux warning cleared — tiers are now stable.

Added platform field and Google AI subscription tiers. AI Pro ($19.99/mo) and AI Ultra ($249.99/mo) as platform plans with platform_plan: true. Renamed plan from Public Preview to Free. Updated credit pack pricing to $25/2,500.
Updated terminology: 'flow credits' → 'prompt credits' across all plans. Free tier now shows '25 prompt credits'.
Renamed free tier plan from 'Experiment' to 'Free' to match current vendor terminology on mistral.ai/pricing.

Split API usage plan into separate Sonnet 4.6 ($3/$15/M) and Opus 4.6 ($5/$25/M) entries. Previously a single plan with Sonnet pricing in the overage field and both models in notes — misleading for API consumers.
Replit Core corrected from $20/mo to $25/mo (monthly billing). $20/mo is annual billing price. Convention: show monthly price, note annual discount.
Added temporal note: Teams $0/mo promotional pricing ends 2026-03-31

details.old_value: JetBrains, centralized billing, RBAC, first 10 seats free
details.new_value: JetBrains, centralized billing, RBAC, first 10 seats free. $0/mo promo ends 2026-03-31

changes.description: Added pricing flux warning. Users reporting opaque pricing changes as of March 2026.

details.old_value: Individual $0/mo, credit add-ons available ($24.99/2,500). Developer/Team/Org tiers TBA
details.new_value: Individual $0/mo, credit add-ons available ($24.99/2,500). Developer/Team/Org tiers TBA. ⚠ Pricing in flux as of 2026-03-12

changes.description: Updated terminology from 'premium requests' to current Cursor language: Agent requests, Tab completions, usage multipliers (3×/20×). Removed stale numeric request counts.

details.new_terminology: Extended Agent limits, 3×/20× usage on all models, no explicit overage

changes.description: Added Aider: open-source terminal-based AI pair programming agent (BYOK). 41K+ GitHub stars, supports 100+ languages, any LLM provider.
Added Windsurf Enterprise plan: custom pricing, 1,000 credits/user/mo, FedRAMP High, on-prem, EU data residency
Added Replit Enterprise plan: custom pricing, dedicated support, advanced security
Updated Antigravity notes: no longer just free preview — formal Individual plan at $0/mo with credit add-ons available ($24.99/2,500 credits). Developer/Team/Org tiers TBA.

details.new_value: Individual $0/mo, credit add-ons available ($24.99/2,500). Developer/Team/Org tiers TBA

changes.description: Added Replit: browser-based agentic coding platform with Agent 3. Starter (free), Core ($20/mo), Pro ($100/mo flat for 15 builders)
Claude Teams plan split into Standard ($25/seat) and Premium ($150/seat) tiers. Premium seat includes Claude Code access.
Augment Code Max plan now has overage top-up: $15/24K credits. Previously listed as no overage.
Added platform bundling metadata: optional platform field at tool level, platform_plan flag at plan level for Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Mistral Vibe
Cursor renamed 'Business' plan to 'Teams' ($40/seat unchanged), updated notes to reflect shared chats, rules, RBAC
Added Devin Enterprise plan: custom pricing with VPC deploy, SAML/OIDC SSO, centralized admin, teamspace isolation
Updated pricing_url from blog post to dedicated pricing page
Added Enterprise plan: custom pricing, pooled usage, SCIM, audit logs
Verified API pricing via developers.openai.com: models updated to o3/gpt-5.4, output corrected to $8-15/M
Augment Code restructured plans: Individual $50 replaced by Indie $20, Standard $60, Max $200
Cline launched paid Teams ($20/seat) and Enterprise plans alongside free OSS tier
Devin Team plan ACU overage reduced from $2.25 to $2.00
Updated pricing URL (anthropic.com/pricing now redirects to claude.com/pricing), corrected Opus 4.6 output pricing to $25/M, updated model references to Sonnet 4.6
Initial dataset with 10 agentic coding tools
Copilot CLI reached general availability
Mistral Vibe 2.0 moved from free to paid Le Chat Pro/Team plans
Devstral 2 API moved from free to paid access
Cursor introduced Pro+ ($60) and Ultra ($200) tiers
